## Description

What does this PR do? Why is it needed?

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / new security check
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Other (describe):

## Checklist

- [ ] Tested on a physical device or emulator (API 24+)
- [ ] NDK builds cleanly: `./gradlew assembleDebug`
- [ ] No new dependencies added without prior issue discussion
- [ ] Relevant documentation updated (README, CONTRIBUTING, inline comments)
